<!-- What changed and why. Keep it concise; details live in commits. -->

## Issue
<!-- Release 集成分支 PR MUST 写 "Refs #N"，创建后在 GitHub Development 侧栏手动关联该 issue。
     GitHub 会忽略目标非默认分支的 "Closes #N" / "Fixes #N"，不要依赖关闭关键字建立关联。
     只有直接合入默认分支且需要自动关闭 issue 的 PR 才使用 "Closes #N"。 -->

Refs #

     ("feat(scope)!: ...") OR include a "BREAKING CHANGE:" footer in this body.
     Any of the three signals causes the auto-labeler to apply the label.
     Describe what consumers must do. -->
